name: GoDaddy
description: Search domain availability and find domain suggestions (no auth required)
longDescription: Official GoDaddy MCP server for domain search and availability checks. Exposes public domain APIs with no authentication required. Find available domains based on keywords, check specific domain availability with pricing. Read-only; purchases and account management on godaddy.com. Rate limited via distributed quota tracking.
author: GoDaddy
examplePrompts: Find available domains for a sustainable fashion brand
Check availability for myidea.com, myidea.ai, myidea.dev
Suggest alternatives to taken domain techcompany.io
